text:
On 04/07/2012 06:20, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/p5-String-Errf,
>
> Please note that PR ports/166704 has just been submitted.
>

For the record I'll say that this PR is neither an upgrade, an 
enhancement nor a bug fix and I find those 'add TEST_DEPENDS' totally 
unnecessary.

That being said, I'll let the submitter commit it.

Thank you,

Géraud
